_comment: Weekly grid from content_foundation_pack §1.2. Both channels follow the SAME rubric grid but each fires on its OWN timezone (en=Asia/Manila reference for India/Philippines evening overlap, hi=Asia/Kolkata IST). day = local weekday in the channel tz. slot A=morning 09:00-10:00, B=evening 18:00-19:30. cta=true marks the natural CTA carrier for the day (P&L, Education). Sunday is intentionally light.
_seedPnlComment: FIRST-WEEK P&L SEED DRIP (reversible). The 5 seed P&L screenshots should go out ~1/day for the first week instead of 1/week on the normal Friday slot. Mechanism: the normal Friday grid pnl-B slot fires the FIRST P&L (2026-06-26). For each channel-local date in `dates` (the next 4 days, Sat–Tue), the publisher injects an extra pnl post in the DEDICATED seed slot `S` (19:30–20:30 local) — a separate slot id from the grid's A/B so it never collides with or is suppressed by a normal evening grid post (Mon psychology-B, Tue education-B). Each day picks the next un-posted ready pnl. Net: 5 P&L over Fri–Tue, ~1/day. Once all `dates` are in the past this block is inert and P&L reverts to the weekly Friday B slot automatically. To DISABLE early: set `enabled` to false (or delete this block).
